spec_match.rationale: Directly models spec values, comparing auto, contain, and chain with correct interactive descriptions.

interactive.rationale: Highly interactive playground: changes style values dynamically, displays scroll event flags, manages log panels, and binds keyboard helpers.

edge_cases.rationale: Debounces scroll reporting checks at 300ms to maintain lightweight tab cycles, and limits log element count.

references.rationale: Properly cites the canonical ChromeStatus link under see also references.

design_system.rationale: Perfect implementation, leveraging ivory cards, clear margins, flat border shadows, and accessible focuses.
